_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: Assotech Windsor Court
project.address: Plot No. GH-05A, Sector 78, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201301
project.tagline: Premium Living Under High Court Supervision
project.description: A spacious, resort-style ready-to-move-in residential complex, but severely mired in the active liquidation of its developer, Assotech Limited.
project.long_description: Assotech Windsor Court is a premium high-rise residential complex located in the high-demand Sector 78 of Noida. Spanning 7.61 acres, the project houses 740 apartments across 6 magnificent towers rising up to G+25 floors. Envisioned with 70% open areas, smart video doorbell security, and beautiful resort landscaping, it delivers excellent physical livability and comfort. However, the project's financial backbone has completely collapsed: the developer, Assotech Limited, is under active liquidation (Official Liquidator appointed by the Delhi High Court). The company's assets are under federal attachment, and the ex-management faces Serious Fraud Investigation Office (SFIO) audits. While the society is physically fully functional and occupied, flat registries are extremely slow and complex, requiring special permissions and clearance certificates directly from the Official Liquidator, creating significant friction for resale transactions.
marketing_claims: 70% open landscaped area with resort styling
Three-side open, highly spacious ventilated units
Smart video doorbell and intercom security
Fully functional clubhouse, pool, and gym
project.project_risk_flag: High Risk: Developer Assotech Limited is in active Liquidation (Official Liquidator appointed by Delhi High Court). Ex-management facing SFIO investigation. Registries require Liquidator clearance.
registry_embargo_reasons: Developer in active liquidation under Delhi High Court orders
Corporate assets attached; registries require Official Liquidator clearance certificates

builder.name: Assotech Limited (In Liquidation)
builder.tagline: In Liquidation Under High Court Orders
builder.company_overview: Assotech Limited is a legacy real estate developer incorporated in Noida. Once a highly respected player with major civil engineering deliverables across Delhi NCR, the group collapsed under massive debt defaults, leading to active winding-up and liquidation proceedings. The company is currently managed by the Official Liquidator appointed by the Delhi High Court, with its ex-management under federal SFIO audits.

unit_types.subtitle: Compact 2 BHK with smart space utilization
unit_types.description: Efficient G+25 layout with double bathrooms and stone-counter kitchen.

unit_types.description: Standard 3 BHK layout featuring three-side open ventilation and premium ceramic finishes.

unit_types.name: 4 BHK (Grande)
unit_types.subtitle: Flagship 4 BHK layout with servant suite
unit_types.description: Palatial 4 BHK configuration featuring dedicated dressing zones, service entrance, and grand central lobby access.

assumptions: GST is 0% because towers are built, but registries are subject to Official Liquidator clearance.
Buyers must expect delayed title clearance timelines due to liquidation admin queues.

payment_plan.notes: Payments routed through specialized court escrow accounts or verified ex-allottee NOC transfers.

milestones.milestone: Final Court Clearance and sub-lease execution

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Assotech Windsor Court offers excellent physical resort-style livability and high spatial footprints, but represents a high legal friction point due to the active liquidation of its developer, Assotech Limited.
why_buy: Spacious layouts featuring three-side open, highly ventilated units.
Excellent resort landscaping and 70% open breathing areas.
Ready to move physically, meaning zero waiting on active construction blocks.
Competitive pricing: Sells noticeably below premium alternatives in Sector 78.
why_avoid: Developer is in active liquidation under the Delhi High Court, creating immense bureaucratic friction.
Registries are highly slow and complex, requiring clear NOCs and certificates directly from the Official Liquidator's office.
decision_profile.best_for: Patient cash upgraders wanting large-format physical flats at discounts, who are comfortable navigating court clearance paths.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Seniors prioritizing fast legal registries, or short-term speculative investors.

buyerPersonas.headline: Large Space at Deep Discount
reasons: Acquiring massive 1,780 sqft carpet areas at high discounts.
Willing to wait out the court clearance queue for eventual sub-lease titles.

riskRadar.description: Towers physically fully completed and delivered.
Winding-up order active. Sub-lease deed execution requires Official Liquidator NOC.

investment_insights.appreciation_desc: Capital gains are heavily capped by the ongoing winding-up proceeding of the brand.
investment_insights.rental_desc: Consistent rental income from professionals working in Noida IT nodes.

persona_profile.risk_appetite: Moderate (willing to handle court administration delays for spacious discounted homes)
persona_profile.family_stage: Nuclear families seeking larger room setups
persona_profile.motivation_note: Aims to purchase massive ready-to-move-in physical footprints at significant discounts, accepting liquidation-related legal administration timelines.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: Assotech Windsor Court represents a solid physical resort asset but comes with heavy legal friction due to Assotech Limited's active liquidation. Only recommended for patient end-users with a long horizon who can navigate Official Liquidator queues.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: For end-users, the physical comfort is great—spacious rooms, great ventilation, and resort gardens. However, the resale registry requires court NOCs, meaning you must be prepared for administrative waiting times of 6 to 12 months.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: This is a poor short-term asset due to liquidation title encumbrances. However, long-term yield-focused investors can secure high-demand rental apartments at bargain values.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Comfortable for families. The spacious 3 and 4 BHK layouts are much larger than neighboring projects at par prices. Secure play spaces are highly functional.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Not suitable for rapid capital appreciation; best for conservative rental yields once physical possession is completed.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Offers lovely resort landscaping, three-side open structures, and smart video doorbell integrations, though branding is mired by corporate defaults.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: High corporate legal risk. Winding-up orders are active, requiring all registries and title deed execution to flow through High Court appointed liquidators.
walk_away_conditions: Any deal where the seller cannot verify an active, clear chain of allotment or clear Noida Authority dues.
negotiation_leverage: Leverage the developer's active liquidation status and SFIO audits to squeeze resale sellers for at least 15-20% discounts below market average.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Only buy if the price is deeply discounted (under ₹9,500/sqft) and you have independent legal advisors handling the Official Liquidator NOC.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Significantly larger room sizes and three-side open, well-ventilated apartment layouts.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Flawless legal safety, active bipartite registries, and absolute freedom from corporate liquidation or winding-up orders.
competitors.verdict: IITL Nimbus wins on legal security and hassle-free transit; Assotech wins only on cheap spatial layout size.
competitors.price_delta_note: Assotech is ₹500 - 1,000/sqft cheaper than Nimbus Hyde Park.
